channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-7208] ost-pools test_7a: test failed to respond and timed out
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah_lw <wei3.liu@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/e7192c60-6076-11e5-ba37-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_7a failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

Cannot find useful info, from the client 2 syslog, don't know what the system was doing from 04:11:02 to 05:12:05

Sep 21 04:11:02 shadow-55vm6 kernel: Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == ost-pools test 7a: create various pool name ======================================================= 04:11:00 (1442808660)
Sep 21 04:11:02 shadow-55vm6 systemd-logind: Removed session c13885.
Sep 21 05:01:01 shadow-55vm6 systemd: Starting Session 77 of user root.
Sep 21 05:01:01 shadow-55vm6 systemd: Started Session 77 of user root.
Sep 21 05:12:05 shadow-55vm6 systemd: Starting Session 78 of user autotest2.
Sep 21 05:12:05 shadow-55vm6 systemd: Started Session 78 of user autotest2.
Sep 21 05:12:05 shadow-55vm6 systemd-logind: New session 78 of user autotest2.
Sep 21 05:12:07 shadow-55vm6 systemd-logind: Removed session 78.
Sep 21 05:12:07 shadow-55vm6 systemd: Starting Session 79 of user autotest2.
Sep 21 05:12:07 shadow-55vm6 systemd: Started Session 79 of user autotest2.
Sep 21 05:12:07 shadow-55vm6 systemd-logind: New session 79 of user autotest2.
Sep 21 05:12:10 shadow-55vm6 systemd-logind: Removed session 79.
Sep 21 05:12:10 shadow-55vm6 systemd: Starting Session 80 of user autotest2.
Sep 21 05:12:10 shadow-55vm6 systemd: Started Session 80 of user autotest2.
Sep 21 05:12:10 shadow-55vm6 systemd-logind: New session 80 of user autotest2.
Sep 21 05:12:11 shadow-55vm6 systemd: Starting Remote Shell Facilities Server...
Sep 21 05:12:11 shadow-55vm6 systemd: Started Remote Shell Facilities Server.
Sep 21 05:12:11 shadow-55vm6 systemd: Starting Session 81 of user root.
Sep 21 05:12:11 shadow-55vm6 systemd: Started Session 81 of user root.
Sep 21 05:12:11 shadow-55vm6 systemd-logind: New session 81 of user root.
Sep 21 05:12:11 shadow-55vm6 rshd[10344]: autotest2@shadow-55vm6.shadow.whamcloud.com as root: cmd='/home/autotest2/.autotest/dynamic_bash/69995628582200+1442812330.58733'
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: SysRq : Show State
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel:  task                        PC stack   pid father
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: systemd         S ffff88007fd13680     0     1      0 0x00000000
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: ffff88007c013db8 0000000000000086 ffff88007c008000 ffff88007c013fd8
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: ffff88007c013fd8 ffff88007c013fd8 ffff88007c008000 0000000000000000
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: 0000000000000000 ffff8800787ce960 ffff88007c008000 0000000000000000
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: Call Trace:
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: [<ffffffff816096a9>] schedule+0x29/0x70
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: [<ffffffff816089dd>] schedule_hrtimeout_range_clock+0x14d/0x170
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: [<ffffffff811aae85>] ? kmem_cache_free+0x1b5/0x1e0
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: [<ffffffff811dc66f>] ? __d_free+0x3f/0x60
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: [<ffffffff81608a13>] schedule_hrtimeout_range+0x13/0x20
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: [<ffffffff8120f5fe>] ep_poll+0x23e/0x360
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: [<ffffffff811c82d3>] ? __fput+0x183/0x270
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: [<ffffffff810a9500>] ? wake_up_state+0x20/0x20
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: [<ffffffff812106fd>] SyS_epoll_wait+0xed/0x120
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: [<ffffffff81614209>] system_call_fastpath+0x16/0x1b
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: kthreadd        S ffff88007fd13680     0     2      0 0x00000000
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: ffff88007c01be70 0000000000000046 ffff88007c008b60 ffff88007c01bfd8
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: ffff88007c01bfd8 ffff88007c01bfd8 ffff88007c008b60 ffffffff81942e80
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: ffff880078b8bbe0 ffff88007c008b60 ffff88007c008b60 ffff88007c008b60
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: Call Trace:
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: [<ffffffff816096a9>] schedule+0x29/0x70
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: [<ffffffff81097da6>] kthreadd+0x2e6/0x2f0

Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: ksoftirqd/0     S ffff88007fc13680     0     3      2 0x00000000
Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: ffff88007c02be68 0000000000000046 ffff88007c0096c0 ffff88007c02bfd8

Sep 21 05:12:12 shadow-55vm6 kernel: ffff88007d002440 ffffffff81936440 ffff88007c0096c0 0000000000000000
item.environment: client and server: lustre-master build# 3192 RHEL7
item.summary: ost-pools test_7a: test failed to respond and timed out

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Closing as a duplicate of LU-7103.
